description: Array interface for FLAC3D interface elements.

functions.name: area
functions.description: Get the area of the interface element.

functions.name: in_group
functions.signature: itasca.interfaceelementarray. in_group ( group_name: str , slot="default" ) → array bool{nelement}.
functions.description: Return interface element group membership as a Boolean array.

functions.name: of_interface
functions.signature: itasca.interfaceelementarray. of_interface ( string name ) → array bool{nelement}.
functions.description: Return interface node of interface with ‘name’ as boolean array.

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.interfaceelementarray. set_group ( membership: array bool{interface} , group_name: str , slot="default" ) → None.
functions.description: Set interface element group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding interface element to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.
